mapper.select: select a.id, a.author_id as authorId, a.title, a.subtitle, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.create_time as publishTime, u.username as authorName, u.image as authorAvatar from article a join user u on u.id=a.author_id where a.is_delete = 0

select a.id, a.author_id as authorId, a.title, a.subtitle, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.content, u.image as authorAvatar, u.username as authorName, a.create_time as publishTime from article a join user u on u.id = a.author_id where a.id = #{id} and a.is_delete = 0
